generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that while we're debating civil defense budgets, foreign actors are exploiting our divisions? Just last month, a local emergency drill was sabotaged by activists who claimed it was 'militarizing communities.' Meanwhile, our neighbors in Europe are strengthening their preparedness programs. We can't afford to let ideological battles weaken our security. #CivilDefenseMatters #NationalSecurityFirst
